title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.19 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD holding above 1.1707, with ECB rate at 2% and Fed at 3.75%; rate divergence favours USD, but EUR/USD may consolidate near current levels.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long positioning at 77.3% (lev_net=+1,029); watch for potential long squeeze if EUR/USD breaks below 1.1650.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 20.3 signals elevated volatility — not a risk-on environment; MOVE Index at 72.2 indicates relatively low bond market stress.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD trading near 0.7060, with RBA hiking rates; AUD carry supported, but watch for potential pullback if AUD/USD breaks below 0.7000.
